narrations.title: What If Alexander the Great Never Died?
narrations.description: Explore real ancient history and thoughtful 'what if' questions. Read, guess, then click to see what happens next.

narrations.title: From Marx to Modern Communism
narrations.description: Marxism, Leninism, Stalin, Mao, and communism today — real history, bold speculation, and guess-prompts at every turn.

narrations.title: How Did Humans Learn How the Body and Mind Work?
narrations.description: An interactive branching history of physiology, psychology, and neuroscience from ancient medicine to modern science.

narrations.title: Who dared to dive deep into the ocean?
narrations.description: A history web about exploring the deep ocean. Historical = supported by evidence. Speculative = educated guess. Alternate = what-if history.
